item.text:
`package.json` contains three scripts:

- `build`: runs TypeScript compilation with `tsc -p tsconfig.json`.
- `lint`: runs a custom config check via `node scripts/check-config.mjs`.
- `test`: runs the Node test runner with `node --test`.

The file also marks the package as private, uses ESM (`"type": "module"`), and only lists `typescript` as a dev dependency.
